stepText: Walk to Port Sarim, make 3 pastry doughs in the northern house with the water icon and one by one try to make them into a cooked redberry pie. Buy 16k feathers from Gerrant (for fly fishing later. If you do not have level 46 fletching yet, also buy feathers to get that level. You will gain 6.33 fletching xp per steel arrow made from scratch, or 6 xp per arrow made with the headless arrows already banked). Speak with Thurgo to progress The Knight’s Sword. Run to Betty and buy 1500 mind runes (pack), 500 air runes (pack), 1500 water runes (pack), 500 earth runes (pack), 500 fire runes (pack), 200 body runes (manual), 100 chaos runes (manual, 9396 gp vs 9950 gp), 150 death runes for Desert Treasure (manual). Talk to Veos to go to Zeah, talk to Veos again and complete the Client of Kourend (destroy the lamps and reclaim them later to put them on herblore), talk to Veos again to travel to Land’s End, grab 1-3 bird snares, five box traps and a butterfly net (https://imgur.com/a/bdU88Xo). Speak with Captain Magoro to return to Port Piscarilius.
itemsNeeded: 95672 gp, 3 pots of flour, bucket, pie dish, 3 redberries
